law: chip label contrast on the actual fill
refute_by: a rendered-CSS contrast measurement over the rendered chip measures below the claimed threshold
rendered_css: .chip-apple-dark-regular { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; border: 0; cursor: default; border-radius: 999px; min-height: 28px; padding: 5px 12px; background: #2c2c2e; color: #f5f5f7; font: 500 13px/1.33 -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; transition: all 200ms ease-in-out; }
